## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Linked Issue
- Closes #

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement(s) satisfied
- [ ] No regression on existing behavior

## Test Evidence
- [ ] `lint` passed
- [ ] `unit` passed
- [ ] `contract` passed
- [ ] `security` passed
- Notes / logs:

## Rollback Plan
- How to safely revert if a problem is found after merge.

## Security & Privacy Impact
- [ ] No new external data transfer path
- [ ] Logs remain minimized (no precise location/raw personal data)
- [ ] No secrets added to code/history
- Notes:

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feat/<issue>-<scope>`, `fix/...`, `chore/...`)
- [ ] Conventional Commit style title (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, etc.)
- [ ] Issue is linked (except docs/typo-only changes)
- [ ] Rebased/updated on latest `main`
